entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop grown in two generations per year

entities.name: SUMMER PLANTING
entities.description: A planting method used in summer to obtain one generation of chickpea

entities.name: TAPARWARIPURA, KASHMIR
entities.description: The location where summer planting of chickpea is conducted

entities.name: MID-OCTOBER PLANTING
entities.description: A planting method used in mid-October to obtain one generation of chickpea

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, where mid-October planting is conducted

entities.name: TWO GENERATIONS PER YEAR
entities.description: The objective of obtaining two crop cycles of chickpea annually
